description: Exploration actions (explore, answer, branch) and session lifecycle

description: Create root SemanticNode for topic, trigger path-question generation via pipeline. Coordinates semantic-store and job-store.

title: Implement answer action: trigger answer generation for a node
description: Trigger answer generation for a specific node via pipeline. Updates node FSM state, coordinates job-store.

title: Implement branch action: compass direction -> child node creation
description: Create child nodes via compass direction selection. Generates follow-up questions, creates edges. This is the wiring target for ConversationCompass click -> path-question generation.
